'''Echo Flight''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] paired with [[Delta Flight]]. 
==History==
[[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] of the [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Squadron]] was once the flight instructor for the unit just before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="trap">{{GamerCite|1|The Starfighter Trap}}</ref>

At one point the Flight was scrambled to prevent a [[pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[freighter/Legends|freighter]] from attacking a [[farmer/Legends|farmer]]'s estate and loading his [[shaak/Legends|shaak]] herd. After dealing with the pirates's portable surface-to-air [[ion missile/Legends|ion missiles]]s, they took control of their weapons, and turned them against them, preventing the freighter from taking off.<ref name="stats">{{Wizards|url=starwars/article.asp?x=starfighter_stats|text="The Starfighter Trap" Character Statistics}}</ref>

They flew blue [[N-X Police Cruiser/Legends|N-X Police Cruisers]] and fought at the [[Battle at TFP-9]] against [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] at [[Station TFP-9]]. Added with the unexpected betrayal by [[Dren Melne]], only five survived and made it back.<ref name="trap" />

After the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Gungans began the construction of a [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] on the Naboo [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. A [[Starship/Legends|shipment]] of machine parts was hijacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] on its way from [[Oxon]] to the moon installation, prompting the [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Royal House of Naboo]] to assign a group of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to escort further shipments. After some escorts, they witnessed another pirate raid.<ref name="trap" />

It happened that one of the pirates was a [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]], disillusioned with their sadistic new leader who ordered the death of all witnesses. Suddenly he changed sides at the height of the battle. The teacherous pirate agreed to guide a group of fighters to their secret base, and Queen [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] ordered them to capture the leader, as the least bloody option.<ref name="trap" />

During that operation, the pilots captured the pirate leader, attempting to force the pirates to surrender, and also rescue some of the [[slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="trap" />
